name: context-generator
description: ContextGenerator pipeline — the chained background workers (auto-title → categorizer → sorter → file-categorizer) that build the searchable context graph used by the picker, system-prompt budget, and Obsidian sync. Each worker registers a ctx.workers.add() lifecycle hook so disable / hot reload kills them cleanly. The LINK / vault-sync worker (last leg of the pipeline) lives in the `link` module because its lifecycle is tied to the link routes; this module's sorter chains into it via cross-module require. Routes (/v1/config/{auto-title,context-categorizer,sorter,file-categorizer}/*) still register from bridge/config/handler.ts — those require() the libraries here.
